news.title:
Punjab & Sind Bank appoints Sh. Rajendra Kumar Raigar as Chief GM and Sh. Rajiv Kumar Bansal as GM, effective April 1, 2026.
Both appointees bring over 32 years of banking experience and advanced qualifications, including CAIIB certifications.
news.summary:
Punjab & Sind Bank appoints Sh. Rajendra Kumar Raigar as Chief GM and Sh. Rajiv Kumar Bansal as GM, effective April 1, 2026.
Both appointees bring over 32 years of banking experience and advanced qualifications, including CAIIB certifications.

news.title:
PSU banks, including Canara Bank, UCO Bank, and SBI, fell up to 5% due to rising bond yields reaching 6.9%.
The Nifty PSU Bank index dropped 3.6%, with 7 stocks declining 10-21% in 2026, led by Punjab & Sind Bank (-21%).
news.summary:
PSU banks, including Canara Bank, UCO Bank, and SBI, fell up to 5% due to rising bond yields reaching 6.9%.
The Nifty PSU Bank index dropped 3.6%, with 7 stocks declining 10-21% in 2026, led by Punjab & Sind Bank (-21%).

news.title:
ICRA reaffirms Punjab & Sind Bank's CD rating at A1, citing strong capitalisation and govt support.
Asset quality is improving but faces macro risks; profitability weak yet showing improvement.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirms Punjab & Sind Bank's CD rating at A1, citing strong capitalisation and govt support.
Asset quality is improving but faces macro risks; profitability weak yet showing improvement.

news.title:
Nifty PSU Bank index falls for fourth day, down 0.6%, impacted by rising bond yields and crude oil prices.
March losses reach 14%, with Punjab & Sind Bank, Indian Overseas Bank, UCO Bank hitting 52-week lows.
news.summary:
Nifty PSU Bank index falls for fourth day, down 0.6%, impacted by rising bond yields and crude oil prices.
March losses reach 14%, with Punjab & Sind Bank, Indian Overseas Bank, UCO Bank hitting 52-week lows.

news.title:
Infomerics reaffirmed Punjab & Sind Bank's Tier II Bonds rating at IVR AA/Stable, highlighting strong sovereign support and sound capitalization.
The bank showed improved asset quality, profitability, and a diversified loan book, though with moderate size and geographic concentration challenges.
news.summary:
Infomerics reaffirmed Punjab & Sind Bank's Tier II Bonds rating at IVR AA/Stable, highlighting strong sovereign support and sound capitalization.
The bank showed improved asset quality, profitability, and a diversified loan book, though with moderate size and geographic concentration challenges.

news.title:
Punjab & Sind Bank reports potential operational impact due to the AIBEA, BEFI, and AIBOA strike on Feb 12, 2026.
The bank is taking steps to ensure smooth functioning but anticipates disruptions if the strike materializes.
news.summary:
Punjab & Sind Bank reports potential operational impact due to the AIBEA, BEFI, and AIBOA strike on Feb 12, 2026.
The bank is taking steps to ensure smooth functioning but anticipates disruptions if the strike materializes.

news.title:
Punjab & Sind Bank received RBI approval to open an IFSC Banking Unit in GIFT City, Gujarat.
The permission, granted on Jan 27, 2026, enables operations in the international financial services center.
news.summary:
Punjab & Sind Bank received RBI approval to open an IFSC Banking Unit in GIFT City, Gujarat.
The permission, granted on Jan 27, 2026, enables operations in the international financial services center.

news.title:
PSU banks like Punjab & Sind Bank, UCO Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, IOB, and Central Bank of India reported strong Q3FY26 results, driven by profit growth and rising net interest income.
Key highlights: IOB's net profit surged 56%, Bank of Maharashtra's by 27%, and Central Bank of India's by 31%, boosting investor sentiment.
news.summary:
PSU banks like Punjab & Sind Bank, UCO Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, IOB, and Central Bank of India reported strong Q3FY26 results, driven by profit growth and rising net interest income.
Key highlights: IOB's net profit surged 56%, Bank of Maharashtra's by 27%, and Central Bank of India's by 31%, boosting investor sentiment.

news.title:
United Forum of Bank Unions plans a strike on Jan 27, 2026.
Punjab & Sind Bank aims to maintain operations despite possible service disruptions.
news.summary:
United Forum of Bank Unions plans a strike on Jan 27, 2026.
Punjab & Sind Bank aims to maintain operations despite possible service disruptions.

news.title:
Punjab & Sind Bank held its EGM on Jan 21, 2026 to discuss key resolutions via video conferencing.
Shareholders approved Rs.3000 crore equity raise via QIP and appointed Jitendra Asati as Govt. Nominee Director.
news.summary:
Punjab & Sind Bank held its EGM on Jan 21, 2026 to discuss key resolutions via video conferencing.
Shareholders approved Rs.3000 crore equity raise via QIP and appointed Jitendra Asati as Govt. Nominee Director.

news.title:
Punjab & Sind Bank targets 10-20% RAM segment growth by March 2027.
The bank aims to achieve a 1% ROA by March 2027.
news.summary:
Punjab & Sind Bank targets 10-20% RAM segment growth by March 2027.
The bank aims to achieve a 1% ROA by March 2027.

news.title:
Punjab & Sind Bank corrected YoY credit growth figures: Retail 19.6%, Agri 24.3%, MSME 22.9%, Corporate 6.9%.
The bank issued a revised investor presentation and apologized for the inconvenience.
news.summary:
Punjab & Sind Bank corrected YoY credit growth figures: Retail 19.6%, Agri 24.3%, MSME 22.9%, Corporate 6.9%.
The bank issued a revised investor presentation and apologized for the inconvenience.

news.title:
Punjab & Sind Bank released unaudited Q3 and 9M FY25 results.
Details are available on the bank's website and shared with BSE, NSE.
news.summary:
Punjab & Sind Bank released unaudited Q3 and 9M FY25 results.
Details are available on the bank's website and shared with BSE, NSE.

news.title:
Punjab & Sind Bank's Q3 FY26 profit rose 19.3% YoY to ₹336.4 cr, with improved NII up 5% at ₹986.2 cr.
Gross NPAs dropped to 2.6%, net NPAs to 0.74%, and business grew 11.8% YoY to ₹2.49 lakh cr.
news.summary:
Punjab & Sind Bank's Q3 FY26 profit rose 19.3% YoY to ₹336.4 cr, with improved NII up 5% at ₹986.2 cr.
Gross NPAs dropped to 2.6%, net NPAs to 0.74%, and business grew 11.8% YoY to ₹2.49 lakh cr.

news.title:
CBI filed an FIR against Punjab & Sind Bank's branch head, Vikas Wadhwa, and 18 others for ₹1,084 crore laundering via mule accounts.
Illicit funds were routed using forged documents, violating KYC norms, causing reputational and financial risks to the bank.
news.summary:
CBI filed an FIR against Punjab & Sind Bank's branch head, Vikas Wadhwa, and 18 others for ₹1,084 crore laundering via mule accounts.
Illicit funds were routed using forged documents, violating KYC norms, causing reputational and financial risks to the bank.

news.title:
Punjab & Sind Bank issued an addendum to its EGM notice for Jan 21, 2026.
The addendum includes approval for appointing Shri Jitendra Asati as Govt of India Nominee Director.
news.summary:
Punjab & Sind Bank issued an addendum to its EGM notice for Jan 21, 2026.
The addendum includes approval for appointing Shri Jitendra Asati as Govt of India Nominee Director.

news.title:
Punjab & Sind Bank reported 3.5% QoQ and 11.8% YoY growth in total business at Rs 2,49,691 crore.
CASA deposits rose 5% QoQ and 8.8% YoY, while gross advances grew 4.7% QoQ and 15.3% YoY.
news.summary:
Punjab & Sind Bank reported 3.5% QoQ and 11.8% YoY growth in total business at Rs 2,49,691 crore.
CASA deposits rose 5% QoQ and 8.8% YoY, while gross advances grew 4.7% QoQ and 15.3% YoY.

news.title:
Punjab & Sind Bank schedules EGM on Jan 21, 2026, via VC to approve equity issuance via QIP worth Rs.3000 crore.
Notice for the EGM will be sent to shareholders holding shares as of Dec 26, 2025.
news.summary:
Punjab & Sind Bank schedules EGM on Jan 21, 2026, via VC to approve equity issuance via QIP worth Rs.3000 crore.
Notice for the EGM will be sent to shareholders holding shares as of Dec 26, 2025.

news.title:
Govt, RBI plan second PSB mega merger to form global banks by 2047.
Post-2019 merger, PSBs reduced to 12; aims for international top order.
news.summary:
Govt, RBI plan second PSB mega merger to form global banks by 2047.
Post-2019 merger, PSBs reduced to 12; aims for international top order.

news.title:
RBI approves S Krishnan as J&K Bank's part-time chairman from Nov 13, 2025.
Krishnan, ex-MD & CEO of Punjab Sind Bank, joined Tamilnad Mercantile Bank in Sep 2022.
news.summary:
RBI approves S Krishnan as J&K Bank's part-time chairman from Nov 13, 2025.
Krishnan, ex-MD & CEO of Punjab Sind Bank, joined Tamilnad Mercantile Bank in Sep 2022.
